name: greerviau
description: Reusable agent skills for engineering and scientific research, one installable plugin per category.

plugins.name: greerviau-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering skills: spec/plan, the GitHub dev workflow, and doc audits.

plugins.name: greerviau-research
plugins.description: Scientific-research skills backed by OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, PubMed, and Crossref.

plugins.name: greerviau-personal
plugins.description: Personal skills: opinion-aware decisions backed by ~/OPINIONS.md.
